name_cn:
🌸 【No Packaging for this Size】
24ss New Shopping Bag
A unique fusion of art and personality, YSL always has a keen eye and wins the hearts of top fashion icons. The Y-shaped calfskin design is eye-catching, giving a casual, lazy, yet full-of-personality feel. Oversized capacity, fits iPad and laptop. Retro minimalist design, great for posing and very photogenic!
 Style No.: 817602 Brown Calfskin
 Size: 38-50×33×16cm
